intro.description: Configure, plan missions, and fly any ArduPilot, PX4, or Betaflight drone. Pair with ADOS Drone Agent to run intelligence at the edge. Open source. Runs in your browser.
intro.privacy: Your data stays on this device.
intro.privacyDetail: We don't collect or track anything.

disclaimer.title: Before You Fly
disclaimer.subtitle: ADOS Mission Control can control real aircraft. Please read and accept the following.

lawfulUse.heading: Lawful Use Only
lawfulUse.body: You agree to use this software only for lawful purposes. You will not use it to conduct surveillance, harass individuals, violate privacy, or support any activity prohibited by law in your country or region.

militaryUse.heading: No Unauthorized Military Use
militaryUse.body: This software must not be used for offensive military or defense operations without explicit authorization from the relevant government authority. Unauthorized weaponization of drones is illegal in virtually every jurisdiction.

aviationRegs.heading: Aviation Regulations
aviationRegs.body: You are solely responsible for complying with all aviation regulations that apply to your location and operation. This includes, but is not limited to:
aviationRegs.item1: Registering your drone with the appropriate authority (DGCA, FAA, CASA, EASA, etc.)
aviationRegs.item2: Obtaining required pilot certifications or licenses
aviationRegs.item4: Operating within altitude, distance, and visual-line-of-sight limits
aviationRegs.footer: This software does not guarantee regulatory compliance. It is a tool. You are the pilot in command.

exportControls.heading: Export Controls
exportControls.body: Drone control software may be subject to export control laws including ITAR (US), EAR (US), EU Dual-Use Regulation, and India's SCOMET list. You are responsible for ensuring that your use, distribution, or modification of this software complies with applicable export control and sanctions laws.

noWarranty.heading: No Warranty & Assumption of Risk
noWarranty.warranty: This software is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, express or implied. This includes, but is not limited to, warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
noWarranty.risk: Drones are physical machines that can cause property damage, injury, or death if operated improperly or if software malfunctions. By using this software, you assume all risk associated with its use. Altnautica and its contributors shall not be liable for any claim, damage, or loss arising from the use of this software, whether direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential.

openSource.heading: Open Source License
openSource.body: ADOS Mission Control is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute this software under the terms of that license.

disclaimer.acceptCheckbox: I have read and accept the terms above. I understand that I am the pilot in command and assume all responsibility for safe and lawful operation.

preferences.title: Set your preferences
preferences.jurisdictionOptional: Optional — sets airspace rules and default units
preferences.demoModeDescription: Try the interface with 5 simulated drones. Turn off when you connect real hardware.
preferences.audioAlertsDescription: Battery, GPS loss, and failsafe warnings with sound.
preferences.yourPositionDescription: Shows your marker on the map. Never leaves your device.
preferences.locationDenied: Permission denied — enable in browser settings or configure later

settings.languageDescription: Choose your display language. More languages coming soon.

community.noTranslation: No translation available for this language

general.title: General Settings
general.demoDescription: Simulates drone telemetry for exploring the interface without a connected flight controller.
general.locationDescription: Browser-local only. Displays your position on map views so you can see where you are relative to your drone. Never sent to any server.
general.geoUnavailable: Geolocation not available in this browser.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.soundDescription: Controls all audio alerts and feedback sounds
notifications.lowBatteryDesc: Alert when battery drops below warning threshold
notifications.gpsLostDesc: Alert when GPS fix is lost
notifications.rcLostDesc: Alert when RC signal is lost
notifications.armDisarmDesc: Feedback tone when vehicle arms or disarms
notifications.waypointMissionDesc: Tone on waypoint reach and mission complete
notifications.changelogDescription: Get notified about new releases and updates when you open the app

inputDevices.title: Input Devices
inputDevices.testModeUnavailable: Gamepad test mode not available in demo

data.title: Data Management
data.exportUnavailable: Export not available in demo mode

communityNav.unavailableTitle: Community data (changelog, roadmap, contact) is live on the hosted version at
communityNav.unavailableSetup: Disabled by default in local builds. To run your own internal community board, set up a Convex backend and configure
communityNav.unavailableOptional: Completely optional. The GCS works without it.

contact.title: Contact

contact.errorRequired: Name, email, and message are required.
contact.errorAuth: Please sign in to send a message.
contact.errorGeneral: Failed to send message. Please try again.

dronePanel.deleteConfirm: Remove this drone from your fleet? Connection data will be lost.

command.codeExpiredMessage: The pairing code timed out after 15 minutes.

agent.shouldReportShortly: The agent should report in shortly

library.title: FLIGHT PLANS
library.deleteConfirm: Delete this plan? This cannot be undone.

fcShared.armedLockMessage: Configuration changes are disabled while the vehicle is armed. Disarm to make changes.
fcShared.disconnectedMessage: Connect a flight controller to access configuration panels.
fcShared.rebootRequired: Reboot required for changes to take effect
fcShared.missingParams: Some optional parameters are not available on this firmware
fcShared.pendingFlashCount: {count, plural, one {1 param} other {{count} params}} modified in RAM, not written to flash

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.pressWhenReady: Press when vehicle is still in position
calibration.sensorCalibrationDesc: Step-by-step calibration wizards for accelerometer, gyroscope, compass, level, and airspeed
calibration.connectToCalibrate: Connect a drone to run calibrations
calibration.bfAccelDesc: Place the quad on a flat surface and keep it still. Betaflight calibration takes about 5 seconds.
calibration.bfAccelStepDesc: Keep the quad perfectly still on a flat surface
calibration.bfCalibrationNote1: Betaflight supports accelerometer calibration via MSP. Gyro calibration runs automatically on every boot. Compass calibration (if a magnetometer is present) should be done through the Betaflight Configurator or CLI.
calibration.bfCalibrationNote2: Other calibration types (level, airspeed, barometer, ESC, RC, CompassMot) are ArduPilot-specific and not available on Betaflight.
calibration.accelCalibrationDesc: 6-position calibration. Place vehicle in each orientation when prompted.
calibration.gyroCalibrationDesc: Keep vehicle perfectly still during calibration.
calibration.compassCalibrationDesc: Rotate vehicle slowly in all orientations until complete.
calibration.compassTip1: Move at least 3m away from metal objects, vehicles, and buildings
calibration.compassTip2: Remove magnetic accessories (phone mounts, metal tools) from nearby
calibration.compassTip3: Ensure GPS fix if possible (helps validate compass orientation)
calibration.compassTip4: Keep a firm grip, you will rotate the drone through all axes
calibration.compassOrientationChangedDesc: The calibration detected a different compass orientation than previously configured. Verify mounting orientation in parameters after reboot.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.name: Parameter
parameters.resetMessage: This will reset ALL parameters to firmware defaults. You will need to re-calibrate sensors afterward. The flight controller will require a reboot.
parameters.rebootMessage: Some parameters you changed require a flight controller reboot to take effect. Reboot now?

preArm.title: Pre-Arm Checks
preArm.gpsNoFix: GPS does not have a fix
preArm.gpsNoFixSuggestion: Wait for GPS lock or check antenna connection
preArm.compassSuggestion: Run compass calibration in the Calibrate tab
preArm.accelSuggestion: Run accelerometer calibration in the Calibrate tab
preArm.rcSuggestion: Complete RC calibration in the Calibrate tab
preArm.batterySuggestion: Charge battery or check BATT_LOW_VOLT parameter
preArm.loggingSuggestion: Check SD card or LOG_BACKEND_TYPE parameter
preArm.fenceSuggestion: Upload geofence in the Plan tab
preArm.ekfSuggestion: Wait for EKF to settle or recalibrate sensors
preArm.safetySuggestion: Press the safety switch on the flight controller
preArm.missionSuggestion: Fix mission errors in the Plan tab
preArm.hardwareSafetySuggestion: Press the physical safety button to allow arming
preArm.clickToRun: Click "Run Check" to verify pre-arm status

flightModes.circleDesc: Circle around a point of interest
flightModes.acroDesc: Full manual rate control, no leveling
flightModes.fbwaDesc: Fly by wire A - stabilized manual
flightModes.fbwbDesc: Fly by wire B - stabilized with altitude hold

actionDialogs.armMessage: Arm the motors? Ensure the area is clear and all pre-flight checks pass.
actionDialogs.disarmMessage: Disarm the motors? The vehicle must be on the ground.
actionDialogs.rthMessage: Command the vehicle to return to the launch position?
actionDialogs.abortMessage: Abort the current mission? The vehicle will hold position.
actionDialogs.killMessage: This will IMMEDIATELY CUT ALL MOTORS. The drone will fall from the sky. This is an emergency-only action. Are you absolutely sure?
actionDialogs.killFinalMessage: Motors will be cut immediately. Drone will fall.

checklist.title: Pre-Flight Checklist
checklist.allComplete: All checks complete — ready for flight

disconnectedPage.installAndConnect: Install the agent, enter this code, and you're connected.
disconnectedPage.turnAnyDrone: Turn any drone into a smart drone
disconnectedPage.mavlinkProxyDesc: Full bidirectional flight controller access over WebSocket, TCP, and UDP. Configure, monitor, and control your drone from anywhere.
disconnectedPage.hdVideoDesc: Live HD video from your drone to any browser. Low-latency streaming powered by WFB-ng and OpenHD with RTL8812-series WiFi adapters.
disconnectedPage.cellularTelemetryDesc: Fly beyond visual line of sight. Real-time telemetry and control over cellular networks. No range limits.
disconnectedPage.extendedRangeDesc: Push your control range to 50km+ using RTL8812AU/EU WiFi adapters in monitor mode. Purpose-built for long-range drone operations.
disconnectedPage.plugAndPlayDesc: Automatic hardware detection and setup. The agent recognizes your flight controller, sensors, and peripherals on first boot. No manual configuration needed.
disconnectedPage.aiReadyDesc: Built for autonomous operations. Python SDK, scripting engine, and REST API let you build intelligent flight behaviors and integrate ML models.
disconnectedPage.softwareDefinedDesc: Turn any ArduPilot or PX4 drone into a smart drone. One companion computer. Full software control over every system.
disconnectedPage.sshTerminalDesc: Full TUI dashboard over SSH. Five screens for telemetry, MAVLink inspection, config editing, and logs. No browser needed.
disconnectedPage.devToolsDesc: REST API at :8080, Python SDK, YAML missions, CLI tools, and five scripting tiers from simple text commands to full autonomy.
disconnectedPage.alphaDisclaimer: This is alpha software. Expect bugs, breaking changes, and incomplete features. The Command tab provides direct control over drone agent services and configuration. Use at your own risk.
